subject: Partner Notification: TechCorp API v2 → v3 Migration Timeline
body:
Hi Partnerships Team,

Please forward the following notification to our integration partner DataSync regarding our upcoming API migration.

---

Dear DataSync Team,

We are announcing the migration timeline for our API v2 to v3 platform upgrade. Please plan accordingly and coordinate with your engineering team.

**Migration Timeline:**
- **June 1, 2026**: v3 API released (parallel availability with v2)
- **September 1, 2026**: v2 enters deprecated status (no new features)
- **December 31, 2026**: v2 read-only mode (write operations disabled)
- **June 30, 2027**: v2 sunset date (endpoint deactivation)

During the deprecation and migration window, both API versions will remain functional. We strongly recommend beginning your integration testing with v3 in our sandbox environment immediately upon release.

**Documentation & Resources:**
Please refer to our public API migration guide for detailed endpoint mappings, breaking changes, and code examples: https://docs.techcorp.com/api/v2-to-v3-migration

Key improvements in v3 include enhanced security, improved performance, expanded features, and simplified authentication patterns.

**Next Steps:**
1. Review the migration guide in your sandbox environment
2. Plan your code updates to align with our timeline
3. Coordinate testing windows with our integration team

If you have questions or need support during this migration, please reach out to our partner success team.

Best regards,
TechCorp Integration Team

---

Please let me know if you need any adjustments to this message or have questions about the migration details.

Thanks,
Internal Communications
